metadata.title: Tier 3 Combined 03 — Submarine Strike Under ID-Required ROE
metadata.description: usub-blue conducts the Strike mission directly against designated target hostile-1 (submarine as primary striker, VLS-launched), while u1 provides surface escort for the HVU role under positive-ID-required (WeaponsTight) doctrine. Both Blue submarine and escort maintain active sensors this scenario (EMCON phase: coordinated active search). Event chain: firing solution computed at tick 6, weapons free authorized at tick 12.
metadata.author: qa-gauntlet
